headline: Sabah Heritage Sites Get Zero Federal Funding in 2026
context: None of Sabah 18 gazetted cultural heritage sites received allocation from the federal Heritage Department RM120 million 2026 budget.

cards.big: Zero federal funding allocated to Sabah 18 gazetted heritage sites in 2026
cards.sub: All RM120 million went to Peninsula sites including RM45 million for Malacca

cards.big: Monsopiad Cultural Village in Penampang needs RM3.8 million urgent repairs
cards.sub: Kadazan heritage centre receives 80,000 visitors but facilities deteriorating

cards.big: Sabah state budget allocated only RM5 million for all heritage conservation
cards.sub: Amount covers basic maintenance but not restoration of 6 critical sites

cards.big: UNESCO tentative list includes 3 Sabah sites but nominations need federal support
cards.sub: Without Heritage Department backing sites cannot proceed to formal nomination

cards.big: Zero funding tests whether federal heritage priorities include East Malaysia at all
Zero federal funding for Sabah heritage sites in 2026. Cultural preservation needs budget lines, not rhetoric.
